message:
fix(raptorq): SparseRow bounds check before zero fast-path, SystematicEncoder degree_min sentinel elimination

Two raptorq correctness fixes:

1. **SparseRow::singleton bounds check (linalg.rs)**: When the
   coefficient was Gf256::ZERO, singleton() returned zeros(len)
   before validating that index < len, silently accepting
   out-of-range indices.  Moved the bounds assertion before the
   zero fast-path.
   Regression test: sparse_row_singleton_zero_value_still_rejects_out_of_range_indices.

2. **SystematicEncoder degree_min sentinel (systematic.rs)**:
   EncodingStats initialized degree_min to usize::MAX as a
   sentinel, but this leaked through the public API when no
   repairs were emitted (degree_count == 0).  Changed to
   initialize degree_min to 0 and seed it from the first repair
   sample via a degree_count == 0 check.
   Regression test: fresh stats assert degree_min/max/sum/count
   are all 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
